song_name: Taylor Swift - Wildest Dreams - Speak Now
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
I heard this song and thought it would go really well with one of her older songs, from 2010. 
I lowered the key because I think that it works better for these songs.

You might need to play it through a few times but give the different chords a chance, 
and at times it took me a while to get the transitions between the two songs perfect, but it can be done!!

Any comments and/or improvements are welcomed!

No capo (these are just the ordinary chords transposed -5, 
so if you want the ordinary chords transpose up!

Chords with a * next to them, just one strum.
